vocab.meaning: những địa điểm kín đáo/ít người biết
vocab.example: Instead of crowded malls, my friends and I prefer hunting for clandestine spots like hidden alleyway cafes.

vocab.meaning: sự mở rộng đô thị (thường mang nghĩa tiêu cực)
vocab.example: Despite the suffocating urban sprawl, there are still a few green sanctuaries where we can gather.
Spending time in public squares allows us to feel more integrated into the local social fabric.

vocab.meaning: sự nhộn nhịp của đô thị
vocab.example: We occasionally head to the city center just to soak up the metropolitan buzz and watch the world go by.

vocab.meaning: các đại lộ/tuyến đường thuận tiện cho người đi bộ
vocab.example: The city has recently developed several pedestrian-friendly thoroughfares, making it much easier to stroll around with friends.

vocab.meaning: các tiện ích công cộng/dân sự
vocab.example: We often make use of civic amenities such as public libraries or community sports centers on the weekends.

vocab.meaning: nơi giao thoa của nhiều nền văn hóa/tầng lớp
vocab.example: The central park is a real melting pot, where we can interact with people from all walks of life.
The botanical garden serves as a haven of tranquility for us when the noise of the city becomes overwhelming.

vocab.meaning: những cuộc gặp gỡ tình cờ đầy thú vị
vocab.example: One of the best things about frequenting public plazas is the potential for serendipitous encounters with old acquaintances.

vocab.meaning: những địa điểm ăn uống nổi tiếng/hấp dẫn
vocab.example: Our group usually gravitates toward the new gastronomic hotspots that pop up in the evening market.
